description: Thr Kry West dttizmt MARGARET FORESMAN Managing Editor RAYFORD ROBERTS Circulation Manager Page 6 Too Much At Stake The Citizen applauds U S Com missioner William V Albury for his sensible and highly appropriate ad monition to the No Name Key free booters for Kheir puny and foolhardy Cuban invasion effort His words are worth repeating The U S Government at this stage in the delicate negotiations be tween Russia and Cuba over mis siles and bombers cannot and will not condone your kind of activity there is too much at stake and all youre doing is upsetting the apple cart The Citizen at the same time must express disagreement with Senator Russell of Georgia for his outburst of distrust of the Adminis tration in foregoing more drastic and dangerous means of inspect ing the missiles and bombers being returned to Russia The alternative he suggests is forcibly landing our military in Cuba and sending inspec tors into the caves at Matanzas and other possible hiding places The Senator would evidently risk World War 111 thereby The Investors Guide Author Stock Buying Guide and Investing Fof Retirement Q The West Coast Telephone Co has written us about exchanging our junior
